description: Clean up and configure a shared shop terminal browser for e-bike technicians. Organize technical bookmarks into three folders on the bookmark bar: 'E-Bike Diagnostics', 'B2B Suppliers', and 'Service Manuals'. Delete all personal and entertainment bookmarks including YouTube, DoorDash, Pinkbike, and Spotify. Clear browsing history and cookies for entertainment domains (youtube.com, doordash.com, pinkbike.com, spotify.com) while preserving data for B2B domains (qbp.com, si.shimano.com, sram.com). Set the default font size to 24 and the minimum font size to 18. Configure the default download directory to '~/Documents/Service_Manuals' and disable the prompt to ask where to save each file. Add a custom search engine for Park Tool (Keyword: 'park', URL: 'https://www.parktool.com/en-us/search?q=%s') and set the homepage to 'https://si.shimano.com'.
